seoTitle: How to Build a Support Ticket System in ClickUp
metaDescription: Learn how to turn ClickUp into a helpdesk using intake forms, custom ticket fields, automated routing, and a live performance dashboard.
intro: You don't need dedicated helpdesk software to run a basic support ticket system, since ClickUp's forms, custom fields, and automation rules can be configured to behave like one. This guide covers building a public intake form, routing tickets to the right agent automatically, and tracking resolution metrics on a shared dashboard.

steps.heading: Set up a dedicated helpdesk Space
steps.body: Create a new list specifically for support tickets, separate from your other project work.

steps.heading: Add custom fields for ticket details
steps.body: Build fields to track Ticket Priority, Issue Category, and Customer Email so every ticket carries the context an agent needs.

steps.heading: Build a public intake form
steps.body: Use a ClickUp Form view to create a submission page that automatically converts external inquiries into organized tickets.

steps.heading: Automate ticket routing
steps.body: Set up a Workspace Rule that assigns new tickets to specific agents based on the selected issue category.

steps.heading: Customize your ticket statuses
steps.body: Set up statuses like New Ticket, In Progress, Pending Customer, and Resolved to track each ticket's lifecycle.

steps.heading: Add a performance dashboard
steps.body: Build a dashboard with widgets to visualize weekly ticket volume, average resolution time, and customer satisfaction metrics.

faq.question: Can customers submit tickets without a ClickUp account?
faq.answer: Yes, the public Form view lets external users submit inquiries without needing their own ClickUp login.

faq.question: How do tickets get assigned to the right agent?
faq.answer: A Workspace Rule can automatically assign new tickets to specific agents based on the issue category selected on the form.

faq.question: Can I track how long tickets take to resolve?
faq.answer: Yes, dashboard widgets can display average resolution times and other volume metrics based on your ticket data.

faq.question: Is this a full replacement for dedicated helpdesk software?
faq.answer: It can work well for smaller teams or simpler support needs, though dedicated helpdesk platforms may offer more specialized features at scale.
